SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.io.exceptions.FileIOException

Packages that use FileIOException
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.io.cache
Provides caching mechanisms for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.exceptions
Provides exception classes for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    AbstractFile.errorDetected(FileIOException e)
    Handles the detection of a file error by updating the file status based on the exception and optionally rethrowing the exception if exceptions are enabled.

    Description

    Closes the file if it is currently open.

    Dynamically allocates the file depending on DD This method determines the appropriate handle, open mode, and other resource configurations based on the input and runtime settings.

    SequentialFile.writeAfter(Advancing advancing, AbstractNField from)
    Writes data to the file after performing an operation on the provided record field and advancing according to the specified advancing behavior.

    Writes data to the file after performing operations on the provided record field and advancing based on the specified advancing behavior and record length.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    DuplicateKeyFoundException
    Exception indicating that a key is duplicated in the dataset.
    class 
    InvalidVsamOrganizationException
    Exception indicating that the requested VSAM organization doesn't match the actual dataset organization.
    class 
    KeyNotFoundException
    Exception indicating that a key was not found during file operations.
    class 
    TableAlreadyExistsException
    Exception indicating that the corresponding already exists
    class 
    TableNotFoundException
    Exception indicating that the corresponding table was not found.
    class 
    VsamEmptyException
    Exception indicating that the corresponding table was not found.
